sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60067" key="kro/kion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρόκιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κρόκη</foreign>, <sense id="n60067.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woollen fillet</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1140.tlg001:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anticl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
